text: @Broadbasedgal Those murima slay queens will be the end of Sifuna

@KagweNahashon @MiskellahMD @WilliamsRuto @KindikiKithure We both know in 2022 Kikuyus were forced by circumstances to choose between two evils. They saw a lesser evil in Ruto and chose him. But as soon as Ruto merged with RAO Kikuyus fled.

@WuodAbilla Luos were being killed by KK government while in opposition, they are still being killed while in broad-based government. They will be massacred post-2027 after electing Ruto. No Raila to kneel in front of Ruto to stop the carnage. They will see bad things here in front.
RT @IanECox: wantam people are insufferable.
@StandardKenya Where are they uko olkalau? Genzs are frauds, they lied to omtata and matiangi
@Dr_AustinOmondi 😂😂l want Ruto to be a dictator after Luos elect him 2027. Hajasahau luos stoned him pale Kondelee in 2022, the payback will be very painful for Luos.
@gabrieloguda In 2027 ,even if Luos demonstrate 36 hours a day, they'll not be allowed in government if this is the behavior,watakaa opposition na kasongo forever
@HonMoses_Kuria You are inciting mt. Kenya residents especially from nyandarua to possibly kill their legislators to get by elections goodies 😂😂😂

@C_NyaKundiH Rent a Kikuyu, Yes You Can but buying one, No You Can't. Ruto thought his billions would endear him. We hate traitors & bullies. Govt used and exhausted all the tricks in the books and lost. My takeway from Ol Kalou , we SHALL have post election violence in 2027!

@kipmurkomen No matter of demonizing will work , he is tribal , primitive , what else he murdered girls , he stole from his brother , now this diatribe everyday ? I think Bwana C's Gachagua is only an excuse your target is Kikuyus.. Never seen your tweet against Mbadi.
RT @Itswambu1: Uku kwa wa maasai wanasema tutam block hatutoki anytime soon
@therealantoh Luos only had one father, rip jakom
@kingethuk Chebukati made Ruto president, Kiluyus have never made anyone president in Kenya without rigging. Election fraud ndio mnajigamba nayo kila election year?

@BravinYuri Ethiopans/eritreans generally keep to themselves and try to totally be unseen, and also blend in. If we are going to play this game, cross over to James Gichuru Road and tackle our warlord refugee brothers with their guzzlers, flats, & attitudes to match 😴

@rawera_jaugenya @MissKwegah1 But bukusus have been consistent they always vote where their kingpin is.........nyinyi wa kakamega mnasema mko na akili and yet you never vote for your own......your very comfortable being other tribe kingpin slaves. Bukusu will follow weta or the bukusu honcho of that time

@DrDennisOuma @WilliamsRuto All along we somalis had the numbers, but we never saw the wisdom in queuing for 6 hours just to vote for a kikuyu president. But 2027 will be different , we somalis have one job, wake up early and vote for William ruto. Kikuyus can cry all they want.

The easiest way for alternative Government to unseat president William Ruto is Wakikuyu wasucrifice any top seat then Kalonzo Musyoka for president Ndindi Nyoro for Deputy president.

@siungugz @MainNeli_ What development did the DCP candidate of Ol Kalou send to his constituents? Absolutely nothing. Murima engages in politics of exclusion, vindictiveness, and hatred of other tribes in Kenya and development of any other region aside from central.
